response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and geospatial experience with open-source contributions, but his background lacks direct evidence of modern C++ or Rust expertise in routing/tiling pipelines. His geospatial work (GISCollective) and low-latency systems experience are relevant, though the role's core technical requirements are not fully matched.
strengths: Extensive geospatial experience (GISCollective, Open Green Map) with open-source contributions in geodata platforms.
Proven ability to build scalable, low-latency systems (Sociomantic, DLang) and distributed architectures.
Strong problem-solving and experimentation mindset, evidenced by workshops and talks on testing/functional programming.
concerns: No explicit mention of modern C++ or Rust experience, which are primary requirements for the role.
Most recent work focuses on TypeScript/Node.js and AI tooling, diverging from the role's geospatial data pipeline needs.
Lacks direct experience with routing/navigation systems or real-time traffic integration, key responsibilities for this position.
